ARTORIACASTER-SUMMER_BERSERKER_FORM_POWE: #Your Attacks deal 2 more damage and can trigger Critical. You take 2 more damage from each enemy attack.

ARTORIACASTER-AVALON_FORM_POWER.title: Avalon Form
ARTORIACASTER-AVALON_FORM_POWER.descript: #The Caster and Berserker passives combined, with no penalty. Permanent. Your ult manifests as AROUND CALIBURN: Unleashed.
ARTORIACASTER-AVALON_FORM_POWER.smartDes: #The Caster and Berserker passives combined, with no penalty. Permanent. Your ult manifests as AROUND CALIBURN: Unleashed.
ARTORIACASTER-CRITICAL_STARS_POWER.title: Caliburn Stars
ARTORIACASTER-CRITICAL_STARS_POWER.descr: #Fuel for Criticals, max 12. In Berserker or Avalon form, an Attack with Critical X consumes X Stars to deal its Critical value instead.
ARTORIACASTER-CRITICAL_STARS_POWER.smart: #Fuel for Criticals, max 12. In Berserker or Avalon form, an Attack with Critical X consumes X Stars to deal its Critical value instead.
ARTORIACASTER-ANTI_PURGE_POWER.title: Anti-Purge
ARTORIACASTER-ANTI_PURGE_POWER.descripti: #Enemy attacks that would hit you are completely negated: the damage becomes 0 before Block is consumed, and it cannot be pierced. Loses 1 stack per negated hit. Max 5 stacks.
ARTORIACASTER-ANTI_PURGE_POWER.smartDesc: #Enemy attacks that would hit you are completely negated: the damage becomes 0 before Block is consumed, and it cannot be pierced. Loses 1 stack per negated hit. Max 5 stacks.
ARTORIACASTER-NP_MANIFESTED_POWER.title: Noble Phantasm Manifested
ARTORIACASTER-NP_MANIFESTED_POWER.descri: #The Noble Phantasm answered the full gauge: the ult of the form you crossed 100 in was added to your hand. Caster and Avalon manifest AROUND CALIBURN; Berserker manifests HOPE WILL CAMELOT. Spend Charge and refill to 100 to manifest it again.
ARTORIACASTER-NP_MANIFESTED_POWER.smartD: #The Noble Phantasm answered the full gauge: the ult of the form you crossed 100 in was added to your hand. Caster and Avalon manifest AROUND CALIBURN; Berserker manifests HOPE WILL CAMELOT. Spend Charge and refill to 100 to manifest it again.
ARTORIACASTER-ESCAPADE_RETURN_POWER.desc: #At the end of your turn: return to your previous form.
ARTORIACASTER-ESCAPADE_RETURN_POWER.smar: #At the end of your turn: return to your previous form.
